title: QA Strategy
description: Interview a team about its product, tech stack, size, and release cadence, then generate a tailored, risk-based QA strategy with an automation plan, quality gates, tooling, and a phased rollout. Scores features by likelihood × impact to focus coverage where it matters, and defines metrics (escape rate, MTTR, lead time, flake rate, mutation score) with precise formulas and enforcing CI gates. Enforces guardrails against invented inputs, big-bang rewrites, one-size-fits-all strategies, testing theater, and vanity metrics with no gate — every recommendation must trace to a stated intake input and land as a measurable gate.
